channel.title: OpenClaw on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in OpenClaw on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Automate Repetitive Tasks with OpenClaw AI for Solopreneurs
item.description: If you’re a solopreneur or freelancer, you know the grind of repetitive tasks. Updating spreadsheets, drafting emails, sorting data, posting on social media—these things eat up hours you could spend on high-value work like closing deals or creating content. You’ve probably wondered if there’s a way to offload this grunt work without hiring help. That’s where AI steps in, and specifically, a tool like OpenClaw can change the game. But before we get to any product, let’s break down how you can start automating tasks today, even if you’re new to AI.
